metadata.title: Vaxal | Build with Intelligence. Scale with Trust.
metadata.description: Your pragmatic growth partner in the AI era. Combining enterprise experience with startup agility.

hero.subheadline: We transform machine intelligence into enterprise assets, ensuring every tech investment delivers clear, quantifiable value. From painless pilots to enterprise-grade governance, Vaxal is your most reliable technology partner.
hero.mockUser1: Help me analyze Q4 sales data and find the best performing products.
hero.mockAgent: Connecting to sales database... Found 3 top-performing products: Product A (+42%), Product B (+38%), Product C (+31%). Would you like a detailed analysis?
hero.mockUser2: Yes, generate a report for the executive meeting.

context.leadText: In the past, digital transformation meant
context.mainStatement1: Now, the LLM AI era has leveled the playing field.
context.mainStatement2: Intelligence is no longer a luxury for large enterprises, but
context.closingText: This is a global wave of progress happening in sync, and the best time to join is now.

trustBar.title: Trusted by leaders & powered by top-tier tech

methodology.title: The Vaxal Method
methodology.subtitle: Technology should deliver immediate impact. Our three-phase approach ensures every stage delivers quantifiable value.

step1.title: Connect (Pilot)
step1.description: Start from pain points with zero friction. Use Ryko Agent to solve specific problems without massive infrastructure, validating AI value quickly. Fast deployment, instant results.

step2.title: Automate (Scale)
step2.description: Connect the dots into a line. Use BrevFlow to integrate global data and cross-department workflows, transforming repetitive labor into AI-powered automation pipelines.

step3.title: Govern (Manage)
step3.description: Achieve enterprise-grade intelligent governance. Deploy SoloistBoard to make AI not just an executor, but a proactive project driver, ensuring absolute control at scale.

products.title: The Vaxal Ecosystem
products.subtitle: The tools we build aren't just for automation—they're designed to empower enterprises with scalable governance capabilities.

ryko.name: Ryko
ryko.description: AI core runtime environment. Supports MCP and microservices architecture, enabling AI agents to precisely orchestrate internal enterprise tools and data.

brevflow.name: BrevFlow
brevflow.description: AI Native workflow automation. Breaking platform boundaries, transforming complex business logic into efficient, reliable AI processes.

formaldoc.name: FormalDoc
formaldoc.description: Standardized document generation system. Transforms enterprise standards into AI templates, automatically producing precise, professional business documents.

soloistboard.name: SoloistBoard
soloistboard.description: AI project governance platform. Through kanban-style management and autonomous AI agents, proactively drive project progress and reduce communication costs.

caseTeaser.title: Decoding the Infrastructure behind a Leading Fashion Brand.
caseTeaser.description: We built Studio Doe an e-commerce infrastructure with high concurrency, extreme stability, and deep modularity. Even facing billion-dollar revenue traffic peaks and complex marketing scenarios, it maintains flawless, efficient operations.

philosophy.title: We Are the Best Proof
philosophy.quote: How do we know it works? We built our entire company on it.
philosophy.description: Complex systems like Ryko, BrevFlow, and SoloistBoard were built by Vaxal using our own AI workflows and Vibe Coding. We're not just theorists—we're the first beneficiaries of this productivity revolution.

pillar1.title: Grounded Value
pillar1.description: We don't sell demo-only showcases. Every phase of implementation must translate into quantifiable efficiency gains.

pillar2.title: Transparent Governance
pillar2.description: We proactively offer AI conversation log exports. Clients stay because they trust our value, not because they're locked into a black box.

pillar3.title: Partner Mindset
pillar3.description: Coming from startups ourselves, we understand growing pains. We're teammates running alongside you, not consultants watching from the sidelines.

founders.title: The Team DNA
founders.subtitle: We're a team of alumni from top universities like NTU and NTHU, with members from leading software companies and innovation labs. We blend the rigorous quality control of large corporations with the rapid agility of small teams.
founders.philosophyText: We're not consultants watching from the sidelines—we're teammates running alongside you. We insist on value over price, delivering the most competitive results for our clients in the most efficient way possible in the AI era.

founder1.name: Rick Chen
founder1.bio: Focused on AI strategy and business architecture, deeply believes AI should be a catalyst for enterprise growth, not just a tool replacement.

founder2.name: Marson Mao
founder2.bio: Leads core product architecture, embraces Vibe Coding and automated governance, dedicated to building extremely stable software infrastructure.

founder3.name: Kathy Pan
founder3.bio: Oversees company operations and process optimization, ensuring the team maintains solid execution during rapid growth.

founder4.name: Jack Lin
founder4.bio: Expert in high-concurrency systems and automated processes. Deeply understands the growing pains enterprises face from 0 to 100.

aboutPage.title: Intelligence is the New Standard.
aboutPage.subtitle: Born from the intersection of enterprise software and AI research, Vaxal is built to bridge the gap between technical potential and corporate reality.
aboutPage.visionLeadText: We deeply believe AI shouldn't be an isolated tool, but the lifeblood flowing through an enterprise.
aboutPage.visionBodyText: Vaxal was founded with a simple purpose: to make complex technology governable, scalable, and deliver concrete business value. Our goal is clear: in the AI wave, build 'digital infrastructure' that truly drives industry progress.

coreValue1.title: Scale with Trust
coreValue1.description: Scaling must be built on a foundation of security and transparency.

coreValue2.title: Value > Price
coreValue2.description: We deliver long-term technical assets, not short-term labor.

coreValue3.title: Vibe Coding
coreValue3.description: Achieve complex engineering goals in the most efficient, intuitive way.

aboutPage.dnaIntro: We're a team of alumni from top universities like NTU and NTHU, with members from leading software companies and innovation labs. We blend the rigorous quality control of large corporations with the rapid agility of small teams.

caseStudyPage.title: From E-commerce Rebuild to Enterprise Data Center: A Four-Year Journey
caseStudyPage.subtitle: Studio Doe initially just needed a new e-commerce system. Four years later, that system has evolved into the data center powering their entire operation — and took flight when the AI wave arrived.
caseStudyPage.metaServiceName: Consultative Dev · Modular Infra · AI Integration
caseStudyPage.ch1P1: In 2022, Studio Doe came to Vaxal with a clear ask: rebuild their e-commerce system. The brand was on the cusp of rapid growth, and their existing platform was already struggling to keep up. They needed a more reliable technical foundation.
caseStudyPage.ch1P2: Most development shops, given this kind of project, would take the safest route — deploy a proven e-commerce framework, deliver fast, close the contract. We didn't do that.
caseStudyPage.fig1Caption: Seamless integration across Studio Doe's online and offline experiences
caseStudyPage.ch2P1: As entrepreneurs, consultants, and developers all at once, we saw something bigger in Studio Doe's trajectory — not just an e-commerce rewrite, but a brand about to grow tenfold. On that trajectory, technology shouldn't be a bottleneck. It should be an accelerator.
caseStudyPage.ch2P2: So without pushing the timeline or inflating the budget, we built a highly modular foundation with data at its core from day one. The e-commerce platform itself was just one combination of modules within this larger system. This was a deliberate choice — we don't do one-time deliveries. Every engagement plants the seeds for long-term growth.
caseStudyPage.ch2P3: That's how Vaxal works: grow with the client, and within the constraints of today's goals, make the best possible bet on tomorrow.
caseStudyPage.fig2Caption: Modular foundation: e-commerce is just one possible assembly
caseStudyPage.ch3P1: The next four years proved this decision right. As Studio Doe's team grew tenfold, the system was never replaced or rebuilt from scratch. Instead, it kept expanding — steadily, reliably. Each new requirement was like constructing a new building in a well-planned city, not tearing the whole city down to start over.
caseStudyPage.module1Desc: Product management, order processing, payment & logistics — the cornerstone of rapid brand growth.
caseStudyPage.module2Desc: Data-driven decisions, with seamless online-offline sync of inventory, membership, and orders.
caseStudyPage.module3Desc: Multi-channel revenue splitting added effortlessly — no redesign required.
caseStudyPage.module4Desc: AI capabilities natively integrated into existing operations, opening a new chapter.
caseStudyPage.ch3P2: From an e-commerce system to the data center powering an entire enterprise. Tenfold team growth. Zero rebuilds.
caseStudyPage.ch4P2: Four years ago, no one could have predicted that LLM AI would emerge and rewrite the rules of every industry. Vaxal is no prophet — but we knew one thing: only a solid foundation can prepare a business for whatever wave comes next. And when this particular wave hit, Studio Doe was one of the few brands in Taiwan with all three ingredients — a self-built e-commerce system, complete ownership of first-party marketing data, and a robust extensible architecture. This allowed AI to generate operational analyses and reports almost immediately, putting them far ahead of the pack.
caseStudyPage.ch4P3: While other brands remain constrained by third-party platforms, unable to freely build new capabilities, Studio Doe has already pulled far ahead through Vibe Coding — and that advantage will only widen.
caseStudyPage.pullQuote: "No one knew AI would rewrite human history like this. But some were ready before it happened."
caseStudyPage.ch5P1: Looking back, the system's deep compatibility with the AI ecosystem was no accident. Thanks to the architectural foresight from day one, every module can easily expose corresponding MCP services, providing native support for AI-human collaboration. The enterprise stays seamlessly connected to cutting-edge AI — without requiring massive system overhauls.
caseStudyPage.ch5P2: While others are still waiting for their platform to open an API, Studio Doe is already running AI-generated reports. That's the decisive advantage of self-built systems and data ownership in the AI era.
caseStudyPage.fig3Alt: MCP service architecture and AI integration diagram
caseStudyPage.fig3Caption: Every module natively exposes MCP services for AI collaboration
caseStudyPage.testimonial: "We initially just wanted an e-commerce site, but Vaxal built us a system that could grow with us. Four years later, our team has grown tenfold, and we've never had to start over — this year we even plugged in AI directly. That was something we never imagined."
caseStudyPage.testimonialAuthor: — An Chih, Founder of Studio Doe
caseStudyPage.ctaTitle: Let Us Be Your Steadfast Partner

rykoPage.title: The Operating System for Enterprise Intelligence.
rykoPage.subtitle: Ryko isn't just an AI model container—it's the core runtime connecting enterprise data with LLMs. Supporting MCP protocols, skill mounting, and multi-modal interaction, letting AI understand your business language.
rykoPage.assertionText: Most AI applications are still stuck at the chatbot stage, unable to touch core enterprise data. Ryko breaks down this wall. It's a standardized runtime that lets LLMs safely read and write enterprise APIs through tools, transforming AI from 'consultant' to 'team member'.
rykoPage.capabilitiesSubtitle: Three pillars of enterprise-grade AI runtime
rykoPage.cap1Desc: Full support for Model Context Protocol (MCP). Write your internal tools once, and any Ryko-powered model can invoke them. Standardized interfaces for precise enterprise resource orchestration.
rykoPage.cap1Visual: Animation: Ryko dispatching tasks to various MCP Servers
rykoPage.cap2Desc: Not locked to any single model. Ryko lets you freely switch between GPT-4, Claude 3, or Llama 3. Choose the most suitable model based on task difficulty, balancing cost and performance.
rykoPage.cap2Visual: Visual: Switching models (OpenAI → Anthropic → Local Llama) seamlessly
rykoPage.cap3Desc: For sensitive data, Ryko supports fully air-gapped deployment. Combined with local models, ensuring data stays within your data center in a closed loop, meeting the strictest security standards.
rykoPage.cap3Visual: Visual: Shield icon protecting a server rack, data staying inside

brevflowPage.title: Workflow Automation, Reimagined for Agents.
brevflowPage.subtitle: BrevFlow is a workflow platform built for the AI era. Here, nodes aren't just rigid API triggers—they're Ryko Agents with decision-making capabilities. It's like assigning tasks to a team of digital colleagues, not writing a script.
brevflowPage.assertionText: Traditional automation (Zapier/n8n) is powerful but can't handle ambiguous decisions. BrevFlow introduces 'Agent Nodes'. When a workflow reaches a decision point, hand it to AI for judgment, then continue execution. This prevents automation from breaking due to edge cases.
brevflowPage.cap1Desc: Embed Ryko Agents directly in your workflows. You can define a node's role (e.g., 'Senior Editor') and give it context. It processes input data like a real person, producing high-quality results.
brevflowPage.cap1Visual: Visual: A flow chart where one node is a glowing brain/avatar
brevflowPage.cap2Desc: Chain multiple Agents into a collaborative network. 'Researcher Agent' gathers data, passes it to 'Analyst Agent' for report writing, then 'Reviewer Agent' checks it. BrevFlow manages all message passing and state synchronization.
brevflowPage.cap2Visual: Visual: Multiple agents passing documents to each other in a sequence
brevflowPage.cap3Desc: Keep control. Set up human review checkpoints at critical nodes. When AI confidence is low or high-risk operations are involved, BrevFlow automatically pauses and notifies administrators to intervene, ensuring safety.
brevflowPage.cap3Visual: Visual: A flow pausing at a lock icon, waiting for user approval

formaldocPage.title:
Enterprise Standards,
Codified by AI.
formaldocPage.subtitle: FormalDoc is a document template construction system. Upload your enterprise standard Docx files, and we transform them into rigorous templates that AI can read and write. We even generate MCP Servers so all AI output meets the highest standards.
formaldocPage.assertionText: Enterprises suffer from chaotic document formats. FormalDoc doesn't just generate text—it locks down 'structure'. Through reverse engineering your existing documents, we extract implicit formatting rules and logic, packaging them into AI tools. Every output is a perfect 100.
formaldocPage.cap1Desc: Upload templates for instant parsing. Whether procurement contracts, technical whitepapers, or quarterly reports, FormalDoc deeply analyzes styles, variables, and paragraph structures. You can also download directly from our standard template library.
formaldocPage.cap1Visual: Visual: Docx file being scanned and broken down into structure blocks
formaldocPage.cap2Desc: Transform templates into tools. FormalDoc automatically generates corresponding MCP Server code. This means you can directly command Ryko: 'Generate a draft using the Procurement Contract Template'—no format tweaking needed.
formaldocPage.cap2Visual: Visual: Template block transforming into a code block/API icon
formaldocPage.cap3Desc: Human-AI collaborative refinement. Generated templates aren't rigid—you can adjust definitions collaboratively with AI on the FormalDoc platform. Ensure every field and clause precisely meets current business needs.
formaldocPage.cap3Visual: Visual: Users and AI cursor editing a document together

soloistboardPage.title:
Project Management
that Drives Itself.
soloistboardPage.subtitle: SoloistBoard is Trello for the AI era. Here, different Ryko Agents play PM, spec writers, and engineers. They're not just avatars on cards—they're productivity engines actively driving progress.
soloistboardPage.assertionText: Project software shouldn't just be a rigid tool for recording status. SoloistBoard brings kanban boards to life. When you create a requirement card, the 'Spec' Agent proactively asks for details; the 'Dev' Agent starts writing code. We turn project development into a symphony between AI and humans.
soloistboardPage.cap1Desc: Purpose-built agents. Configure different Agent roles for your project: Product Owner Agent clarifies requirement boundaries, Tech Lead Agent handles architecture review. They have their own identities and responsibilities on the board.
soloistboardPage.cap1Visual: Visual: Kanban board columns with Agent avatars on top
soloistboardPage.cap2Desc: Say goodbye to passive waiting. SoloistBoard's Agents actively check card stagnation time, send reminders, even auto-generate meeting summaries or daily reports. It ensures projects always maintain forward momentum.
soloistboardPage.cap2Visual: Visual: Notification popups from Agents nudging the progress
soloistboardPage.cap3Desc: All Agents share the same project context. Whether documents, conversation logs, or code changes, everything becomes the Agents' long-term memory. This dramatically reduces redundant communication between humans and AI.
soloistboardPage.cap3Visual: Visual: A central brain connecting to various project artifacts
